untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of alternating bid/ask jumps (3+ consecutive bounces alternating ask-to-bid and bid-to-ask), distance from midpoint measured in spread multiples (1.5× spread), and explicit midpoint reversion logic. None of these microstructure features (order flow direction, bid/ask sequencing, spread decomposition, midpoint tracking) are available in the allowed indicator set. The signal is inherently order-book driven and cannot be expressed using OHLCV-based technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial proxy: vol_ratio_20 < 0.40 approximates 'low volume on bounce move' (volume below 40th percentile). bb_middle approximates midpoint mean reversion. However, this loses the core logic: alternating bid/ask price jumps and spread-relative positioning. This signal requires tick-level or L2 data (order book) to implement correctly.
